name: pmstack
description: Product-marketing stack for Claude Code — positioning, conversion copy, trust audits, visual critique, SEO, and A/B planning. Opinionated; refuses to fabricate.

plugins.name: pmstack
plugins.description: A gstack-shaped plugin that turns Claude Code into a virtual product-marketing team. 10 commands, 6 opinionated subagents, 4 skills. Honesty-by-default: a trust auditor blocks shipping copy that's ahead of the product, fabricated, or regulatorily exposed. Works on any product (Lithuanian, English, B2C, B2B).
